title: 2026 Golden Globe Awards Complete Winners List
text: The 83rd Golden Globe Awards held on January 11, 2026 recognized KPop Demon Hunters as the winner of Best Animated Feature. The ceremony was relatively predictable, with One Battle After Another dominating with four awards: Best Film Comedy/Musical, Best Director (Paul Thomas Anderson), Best Screenplay (Paul Thomas Anderson), and Best Supporting Actress (Teyana Taylor). The biggest surprise came late in the evening when Hamnet claimed Best Film Drama, along with Best Drama Actress for Jessie Buckley. This was described as an eye-brow-raising choice, as the film had faded from Oscar frontrunner status in recent weeks. Emmy winners dominated TV categories, with The Pitt winning Best Drama Series and Best Drama Actor (Noah Wyle). The Studio took Best Comedy Series and Best Comedy Actor (Seth Rogen). Adolescence swept with Best Limited Series/Movie and supporting acting honors. The ceremony introduced its inaugural Best Podcast category, which was won by Good Hang With Amy Poehler, hosted by former Golden Globes presenter Amy Poehler.
